parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "flow_id": "security.hackerone.triage",
  "flow_name": "HackerOne Report Triage",
  "node_id": "llm.triage",
  "prompt_template": "You are a senior security analyst. Triage this HackerOne report.\n\nReport title: {title}\nReport body: {body}\nAffected asset: {asset}\n\nOutput: severity (P0-P3), likely component, recommended owner.",
  "model_name": "gpt-4o-mini",
  "model_provider": "openai",
  "temperature": 0.0,
  "input_json": {{ JSON.stringify($('Webhook').item.json) }},
  "output_text": {{ JSON.stringify($json.message.content) }},
  "latency_ms": 0,
  "token_usage_json": {{ JSON.stringify($json.usage || {}) }}
}
